title: geonoma pohliana subsp. trinervis
intro: Geonoma pohliana subsp. trinervis is a subspecies of the Geonoma pohliana species, which is a type of palm tree native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help with wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Geonoma pohliana subsp. trinervis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Geonoma pohliana subsp. trinervis is often used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
